whatsNew.summary: Create and edit trails directly on the map with our new drawing tools.
Trail details now appear inside Strava route builder via the Chrome extension. (experimental)
Sandbox mode lets you try editing on the map before you sign in, and save drafts when you’re logged in.

upcoming.summary: We’re making it easier to add and manage photos from Strava, the map, and the extension.
We’re planning a tutorials hub so you can learn the app from short videos inside Trail Overlay.
We’re fixing the browser extension so trail lines show reliably on the Strava map again.
We’re moving extension settings to a clearer spot on the plug-in icon.
We’re rebuilding edit mode on the site so it’s simpler to refine trails and networks.
We’re updating how Trail Overlay talks to Strava as their API rules change.
We’re exploring smoother drawing tools in the extension for route edits.
We’re polishing site-wide theming so light, dark, and map views feel cohesive.
